title: OASIS DROP-IN DAY CENTER - 211info
text: CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD OASIS DROP-IN DAY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A collaborative project that provides homeless families priority access to a coordinated set of services offered at multiple locations in the G Street neighborhood. The participating organizations function as a campus, with all services within easy walking distance. Services include: -A safe place to be during the day -Access to laundry, showers, and restroom facilities -A place to prepare and eat simple meals -Help finding affordable housing and employment -Access to additional school and community based resources 1025 G Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Households experiencing homelessness and at least one child age 17 and younger in their care Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-4pm, Wednesday 8am-6pm, closed holidays Email (541) 345-3628 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 345-3628 Main phone Main phone (541) 345-3628 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake appointment or more information. Visit website or walk in to complete the OASIS Interest Form to learn more about the program. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Friday 8am-4pm, Thursday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of 10th and G Streets. On LTD Bus Line 18. Services: Food Preparation Facilities * Homeless Families Homeless Drop In Centers Housing Search Assistance * Homeless Families Job Finding Assistance * Homeless Families Laundry Facilities * Homeless Families Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Families Specialized Information and Referral * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMELESSNESS PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REFUGEE AND IMMIGRANT SERVICES PROGRAM MATERIAL GOODS - CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES COMMUNITY SERVICE CENTER UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CATHOLIC COMMUNITY SERVICES SPRINGFIELD
